## 4. Definition of Success

Set measurable outcomes for this project. Use explicit targets where possible.

- <metric-1>: <baseline> -> <target>
- <metric-2>: <baseline> -> <target>
- <metric-3>: <baseline> -> <target>

Operational compliance targets:

- 100% of completed tasks include required handoff metadata with canonical phase values.
- 100% of participating agents log required entries to `MEMORY_LOG.md` and `METRICS.md` directly or via delegated logging with attribution.
- 100% of skipped phases have matching `DECISION` rows in `MEMORY_LOG.md`.
- `EVOLUTION_LOG.md` receives one row per Learning phase indicating applied/no-change status.
